# Study Quest - React Native Project Instructions

## Project Overview
Study Quest is a React Native mobile application designed to help students manage their studies effectively through:
- Timetable creation and management
- Course content uploads
- Automated study curriculum/plan generation
- Progress tracking
- Motivational features

## Progress Tracking
- [x] Create copilot-instructions.md file
- [x] Scaffold React Native project
- [x] Create project structure and screens
- [x] Implement core features
- [x] Install dependencies and compile
- [x] Create documentation

## Development Guidelines
- Use TypeScript for type safety
- Follow React Native best practices
- Keep UI fun and motivating
- Use React Navigation for routing
- Implement local storage for data persistence
